title: 更新生产进度和出货时间
theme: 从 schedule / progress / delay 开始
goals: 能向客户说明当前生产进度和预计完成时间
能礼貌解释延误原因，并给出下一次更新时间
能在出货前确认验货、完成日期和发货安排

review.title: Day 06 复习
items: 昨天练了 courier、air freight、sea freight、destination port 和 tracking number。
今天进入生产进度沟通：客户催货、问什么时候完成、问能否按时出货。
客户问进度时，不要只说 soon，要说明当前状态、预计时间和下一步动作。

preview.scenario: 客户已经下单付款，正在等待生产完成和出货，现在频繁询问生产进度、完成时间和是否会延误。
needToKnow: progress 是进度，适合表达 current progress 或 production progress。
delay 要谨慎使用，说明原因后要给解决方案或下一次更新时间。
ready date、inspection、dispatch 可以把“做好、验货、发出”三个节点说清楚。

vocabulary.usage: 用于生产计划、出货计划或客户要求的时间安排。
vocabulary.example: We are checking the production schedule with our factory.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明订单、样品或生产的当前状态。
vocabulary.example: I will update you on the production progress today.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明生产、包装或出货不能按原计划完成。
vocabulary.example: There may be a short delay because the packaging material arrived late.

vocabulary.usage: 用于出货前质量检查或客户第三方验货。
vocabulary.example: We can arrange inspection before shipment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明生产完成或订单完成。
vocabulary.example: The estimated completion date is next Friday.

vocabulary.meaning: 可出货日期 / 备好日期
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明货物什么时候可以发出或提货。
vocabulary.example: I will confirm the ready date and update you today.

vocabulary.usage: 用于货物从工厂发出或交给物流。
vocabulary.example: We will dispatch the goods after final inspection.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明订单是否能按计划完成或出货。
vocabulary.example: We are doing our best to ship the goods on time.

sentences.label: 更新进度
sentences.business: Production is still in progress, and I will update you again after checking with our factory.

sentences.label: 确认完成时间
sentences.natural: I will let you know when the goods are ready.
sentences.business: I will confirm the ready date with our factory and update you today.

sentences.label: 解释延误
sentences.natural: There may be a short delay.
sentences.business: There may be a short delay because the packaging material arrived late, but we are pushing the factory to finish as soon as possible.

sentences.label: 安排验货
sentences.natural: We will inspect the goods before shipment.
sentences.business: We will arrange final inspection before shipment and send you photos for confirmation.

sentences.label: 按时出货
sentences.natural: We will try to ship the goods on time.
sentences.business: We are doing our best to keep the schedule and ship the goods on time.

chatAnalysis.problem: soon 太模糊，客户不知道当前进度和具体时间。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Production is still in progress, and I will confirm the ready date with our factory today.

chatAnalysis.problem: 只说工厂忙会显得推卸责任，需要说明原因和处理动作。
chatAnalysis.better: There may be a short delay.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: There may be a short delay, but we are pushing the factory and will update you with the new ready date today.

chatAnalysis.problem: check 太泛，需要说明是 final inspection，并承诺发照片或结果。
chatAnalysis.better: We will inspect the goods before shipment.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We will arrange final inspection before shipment and send you photos for confirmation.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户询问生产进度

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the production progress now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Production is still in progress. I will check the latest status with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When will the goods be ready?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will confirm the ready date and update you today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：出货前验货

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you inspect the goods before shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. We will arrange final inspection before shipment and send you photos for confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure everything is correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. We will check the quantity, packaging, label, and shipping mark carefully.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户担心延误

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will there be any delay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: There may be a short delay because the packaging material arrived late.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We cannot accept a long delay.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We are pushing the factory and will update you with the new ready date today.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户催生产进度、验货和出货时间

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, can you update me on the production progress?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Production is still in progress, and I am checking the latest status with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How much has been finished?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: About 60 percent has been finished, and the remaining quantity is still under production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When will all goods be ready?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will confirm the ready date with our factory and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The original schedule was this Friday.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we are doing our best to keep the schedule and finish on time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is there any risk of delay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: There may be a short delay because the packaging material arrived late.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How many days will it be delayed?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I need to confirm the exact delay with our factory first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please push them. We need the goods urgently.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We are pushing the factory and will try to finish as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you ship part of the goods first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check if partial dispatch is possible for this order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If partial dispatch is possible, please send the first batch quickly.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the finished quantity and shipping schedule for the first batch.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will you inspect the goods before shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. We will arrange final inspection before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send photos after inspection?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. We will send you photos for confirmation before dispatch.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also check the packaging and labels.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We will check the quantity, packaging, labels, and shipping mark carefully.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When can you give me the final ready date?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will confirm the final ready date with our factory and update you before the end of today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please keep us updated every day.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will keep you updated on the production progress every day until shipment.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：生产仍在进行中，我会今天更新你。
exercises.answer: Production is still in progress, and I will update you today.
acceptable: production is still in progress and i will update you today
production is still in progress i will update you today
exercises.hint: in progress 表示正在进行中。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：soon finish
exercises.answer: Production is still in progress, and I will confirm the ready date today.
acceptable: production is still in progress and i will confirm the ready date today
i will confirm the ready date with our factory today
exercises.hint: 不要只说 soon，要说进度和 ready date。

exercises.prompt: 填空：We will arrange final ____ before shipment.
客户问 Will there be any delay? 哪个回复更适合？
options: There may be a short delay, but we are pushing the factory and will update you today.
exercises.answer: There may be a short delay, but we are pushing the factory and will update you today.
acceptable: there may be a short delay but we are pushing the factory and will update you today
exercises.hint: 说明延误风险，同时给处理动作和更新时间。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们会尽力按时出货。
exercises.answer: We will do our best to ship the goods on time.
acceptable: we will do our best to ship the goods on time
we are doing our best to ship the goods on time

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you send photos after inspection? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Of course. We will send you photos for confirmation before dispatch.
acceptable: of course we will send you photos for confirmation before dispatch
we will send you photos for confirmation before dispatch
exercises.hint: photos for confirmation 表示发照片给客户确认。

homework: 把 schedule、progress、delay、inspection、ready date 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练生产延误和验货前确认。
tomorrow: Day 8 会练缺货、替代方案和补货时间的表达。
